headline: Big Balder Brand: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Big Balder Brand carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 88.39, led by Trey McBride, Rashee Rice, and A.J. Brown. The clearest lineup pressure point is the FLEX slot held by Chris Godwin at 62.4 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Trey McBride (99.5), Rashee Rice (95.5), and A.J. Brown (94.2).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Chris Godwin is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 62.4. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 13 offensive players, with 5 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 76.65.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 13 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
